heading: Quarters: Nurse Corps officers; assignment in hospitals
label: 8777 Quarters: Nurse Corps officers; assignment in hospitals
text: Under such regulations as the Secretary of the Navy prescribes, officers in the Nurse Corps may be assigned quarters in naval hospitals.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7577(2d proviso, less 1st 21 words).34 U.S.C. 43h(a)(2d proviso, less 1st 25 words), .Apr. 16, 1947, ch. 38, § 208(a)61 Stat. 50
